title: SequenceFile Management in MapReduce
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest/impl' directory, specifically the 'EntryFileIO.java' file within, is responsible for managing 'FileEntry' objects in Hadoop's MapReduce framework. It offers functionalities for writing and reading these entries to and from a SequenceFile. The 'EntryWriter' class uses a blocking queue for managing entries, processed by a dedicated thread for writing to the SequenceFile. The class provides methods for creating writers and readers, iterating over entries, and managing a writer thread, collaborating with other classes in the package for comprehensive file entry management. This directory exemplifies the Factory and Worker pattern, where 'EntryFileIO' acts as a factory for writers and readers, and the writer thread serves as a worker.
